summary.summary: Adds the .settingsHighlightScroll() SwiftUI view modifier to 16 settings sub-screens that previously lacked it, enabling scroll-to-and-highlight behavior when navigating to a setting from search results. The change is implemented by inserting .settingsHighlightScroll() calls in multiple Root/View files (see file list and diff).
summary.userFacingImpact: Search-to-setting navigation should now scroll to and highlight the targeted setting in the affected sub-screens. The change is limited to adding the .settingsHighlightScroll() modifier in view files; the patch does not show other behavioral or logic changes, but UI verification is recommended.
